generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measures hoist swinging motion using an encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "monitors wind speed for environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorPositionFeedback : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "provides position and status feedback for cart stepper motor via TMC4671-Eval controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorPositionFeedback : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "provides position and status feedback for hoist stepper motor via TMC4671-Eval controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorPositionFeedback
]

instance HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorPositionFeedback
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "time-series swing angle measurements from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "time-series wind speed measurements from anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CartMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "time-series cart motor position and status data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance HoistMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "time-series hoist motor position and status data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart movement stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist movement stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling at hoist end"
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane with stepper motors, electromagnet, and sensors"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python-based interface for transmitting sensor data to digital twin"
]

instance ControlApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Application controlling motor movements via Physical Crane Interface"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Application streaming time-series data to TimescaleDB"
]

instance HMI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Human-Machine Interface for operator interaction"
]

instance CADModel_Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 CAD model for physical crane geometry"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of gantry crane movements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for trajectory execution testing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerEnabler
]

instance ArcadiaModel_Capella : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia model created in Capella for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerEnabler
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture visualization of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for storing sensor data and system metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time message exchange between services"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService, DatabaseService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualization tool for creating operational dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization platform for service deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance GantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for physical crane control interface"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlApplication
]

instance ArduinoIDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino IDE for hardware control and sensor interfacing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB for time-series storage"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization for operational dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryVisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedTrajectoryAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for trajectory execution testing before physical deployment"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements against simulations with threshold-based alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for state synchronization between digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:provides MessageExchangeInsight
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage for historical analysis and system validation"
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trajectory traces with simulation confidence bounds for system performance assessment"
]

instance OptimizedTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operational decisions guided by trajectory optimization outputs"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of trajectory execution in simulated environment"
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts triggered when validation thresholds are breached"
]

instance MessageExchangeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time message exchange between services via MQTT protocol"
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin environment hosting all services and physical containers on a single machine"
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, PhysicalCraneInterface, ControlApplication, LoggingApplication, HMI, DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService, TimescaleDBEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, DockerEnabler, GantrylibEnabler, ArduinoIDEEnabler, CADModel_Fusion360, KinematicModel, SimulationModel, ArcadiaModel_Capella, C4Model, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer, CartMotorPositionFeedback, HoistMotorPositionFeedback, SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, CartMotorPositionData, HoistMotorPositionData, SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted, HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted, DataStorageInsight, TrajectoryVisualizationInsight, OptimizedTrajectoryAction, SimulationValidationInsight, ValidationAlertInsight, MessageExchangeInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are sent via the Control Application to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates them into motor control signals for the cart and hoist motors. The electromagnet is actuated based on trajectory execution instructions."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for data logging and validation, with the Continuous Validation Service performing instantaneous comparisons between measured and simulated trajectory data. Logging occurs at sensor update rates for all state variables."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized system where physical containers (Crane, Interface, Control App, Logging App, HMI) and digital twin containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation, MQTT Broker) run on a single personal computer. Docker-compose manages DB, MQTT, and Dashboard containers, with MQTT handling inter-service communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as-designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and as-operated stages. The kinematic model and simulation services support operational validation during runtime, while CAD models represent the initial design phase."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between real-time measurements and simulation outputs, comparing against predefined thresholds. Confidence bounds from simulations (e.g., blue and yellow upper/lower bounds in Grafana) validate model accuracy during trajectory execution."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical Crane Interface (Python) communicates with hardware controllers via serial/USB. MQTT protocol handles service-to-service messaging, while TimescaleDB uses SQL for data storage and retrieval. All connections are local to the host machine."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a single personal computer. Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard run in Docker containers orchestrated via docker-compose. The gantrylib Python module is installed via pip, with hardware control via Arduino firmware."
]
